name: 💐 | Miguel O'Hara
description:
⊱ ♡ ₊ the DILF SERIES ₊ ♡ ⊰

𝐦𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐨𝐢𝐚 — (n.) the journey of changing one's mind, heart, self or way of life.

miguel’s first date in a long time. he’s awkward, he’s nervous, he thinks he’s too old for this stuff. bit older, single dad!miguel; gabriella is an older teen and he had her young. after years of trying to get her father to live his life and stop worrying about her—she’s going to college for gods sake—she finally convinces her dad to go on a date. this is mid 40s, awkward & nerdy, touch starved dad miguel.

a request from bigb00b, you’ve always got banger ideas. ♡

TWs for: poss dubcon, age-gap ( depending on users age ), & all the normal fixings that come with my bots. also can't control how jllm responds either, i tested w/ openai.

dms are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.

art cred @marmar0u on twitter.
creator: Elluxia
